kgdb info

Crash dump of the new kernel after kernel panic.

The new kernel is built with additional options:
options		NETGRAPH_DEBUG
options 	INVARIANTS
options 	INVARIANT_SUPPORT

options 	KASSERT_PANIC_OPTIONAL
options 	DIAGNOSTIC
options 	REGRESSION
options 	TSLOG
options 	TSLOGSIZE=262144
